metadata.title: Zangon Kataf Local Government
metadata.description: Official website of Zangon Kataf Local Government Area, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

slides.title: Zangon Kataf – Culture and Agriculture
slides.subtitle: Zangon Kataf Local Government Area is known for its rich cultural heritage and strong agricultural communities in southern Kaduna.

slides.title: Zangon Kataf – Communities Driving Development
slides.subtitle: Farmers and traders across the LGA contribute to economic growth and food production in Kaduna State.

paragraphs: Zangon Kataf Local Government Area is located in the southern region of Kaduna State, Nigeria. The administrative headquarters is Zonkwa town.
The LGA is predominantly inhabited by the Atyap (Kataf) people alongside Bajju, Hausa, and Fulani communities.
Agriculture forms the backbone of the local economy, with crops such as maize, millet, sorghum, ginger, and groundnuts cultivated across the region.

chairman.name: Executive Chairman, Zangon Kataf Local Government
messageParagraphs: Welcome to the official website of Zangon Kataf Local Government Area. Our administration is committed to improving infrastructure, education, and healthcare services for our communities.
Zangon Kataf is blessed with fertile agricultural land and hardworking citizens who contribute significantly to food production within Kaduna State.
Through transparent governance and strong collaboration with community leaders, we aim to build sustainable development and prosperity for our people.

cards.title: Maize Farming
cards.subtitle: Staple Crop
cards.description: Maize is widely cultivated across communities in Zangon Kataf and serves as a staple food crop.

cards.title: Ginger Farming
cards.subtitle: Cash Crop
cards.description: Ginger farming contributes significantly to Kaduna State’s position as one of the largest ginger producers in Nigeria.

cards.title: Livestock Rearing
cards.subtitle: Animal Husbandry
cards.description: Livestock such as cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry are raised across rural communities within the LGA.

news.subtitle: Stay informed about development projects, community programs, and government initiatives in Zangon Kataf.

footer.headquarters: Headquarters: Local Government Secretariat, Zonkwa, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

hero.title: About Zangon Kataf
hero.subtitle: Discover the culture, geography, and economy of Zangon Kataf Local Government Area.

leadership: Executive Chairman: Zangon Kataf Local Government
location: Neighboring LGAs: Kauru, Kaura, Jaba, and Kachia.
demographics: Major Ethnic Groups: Atyap (Kataf), Bajju, Hausa, Fulani.
Languages Spoken: Atyap language, Hausa, and English.
economy: Main Economic Activities: Farming, livestock rearing, and rural trade.
Climate: Tropical savannah climate suitable for agriculture.

geographyEconomy.title: Geography & Economy
geographyEconomy.location: Zangon Kataf lies within southern Kaduna and consists of fertile farmland and rural agricultural communities.
geographyEconomy.climate: The LGA experiences a rainy season between May and October and a dry season between November and April.
mainActivities: Crop Farming: Maize, millet, sorghum, ginger, and groundnuts.
Livestock Rearing: Cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry.
Local Markets: Agricultural trading across community markets.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Reach out to Zangon Kataf Local Government for inquiries and information.
